name: BEAZER HOMES USA INC
business: Beazer Homes designs, constructs, markets, and sells single-family homes and communities across 13 states in the West, East, and Southeast regions, targeting entry-level, move-up, and 55+ age-restricted buyers.

exposures.sentence: Beazer Homes is a nationally recognized homebuilder committed to building homes and communities designed with the intention of inspiring sustainable and healthier living.
we have begun introducing solar-included communities, in which every home will include a fully installed solar energy system.

Our computer systems, including our back-up systems and portable electronic devices, and those of our third-party providers, are subject to damage or interruption from power outages, computer and telecommunication failures, computer viruses, security breaches including malware and phishing, cyberattacks, natural disasters, usage errors or misconduct by our employees or contractors, and other related risks.
Presently, we employ a limited array of traditional and generative artificial intelligence (AI) solutions for certain functions for our operations.

catalysts.sentence: reaching more than 200 active communities by the end of fiscal 2027,

catalysts.event: Reduce net debt to net capitalization ratio to low 30% range
catalysts.sentence: reducing our net debt to net capitalization ratio to the low 30% range by the end of fiscal 2027,

catalysts.event: Achieve double-digit CAGR in book value per share from end of fiscal 2024 through fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: achieving a double-digit compound annual growth rate in book value per share from the end of fiscal 2024 through fiscal 2027.

catalysts.event: Board approved new share repurchase program for up to $100 million
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, the Company's Board of Directors approved a new share repurchase program that authorizes the Company to repurchase up to $100.0 million of its outstanding common stock.
